use_cases: Landing page hero backgrounds with ambient animated effects
Dashboard or app backgrounds providing visual depth
Creative portfolio backgrounds with dynamic motion
Event or product launch page decorative layers
ai_summary: An animated canvas background component that renders expanding ripple effects with customizable colors, speed, and count. The ripples emanate from random points and fade as they expand, creating an ambient visual effect suitable for dark-themed landing pages, hero sections, or decorative backgrounds. Configurable via props for background color, ripple color, ripple count, and animation speed.
